reason: Browser use feature successfully navigates to URLs, retrieves page titles, and reports results accurately.
steps: Step 1: Navigate to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing agent list
Step 2: Find and click the "QA-20260624-183548-fd9w" agent in sidebar — Agent page opened successfully
Step 3: Send message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working"
Step 4: Wait up to 3 minutes for response — Response completed in 17 seconds with agent returning to "idle" status
Step 5: Verify response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states "The page title is \"Example Domain\"" confirming successful browser navigation and page title retrieval
